title: verbascum × dominii
intro: Verbascum × dominii, also known as Dalmatian mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant species derived from the Verbascum lychnitis and Verbascum thapsus plants. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Verbascum × dominii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
